questions.sample_sentence: I jumped with glee when I received the green card from Omana ma'am.
I saw a host of Sastha Catering Services staff at the Music Academy canteen in Chennai.
We were all in a jocund mood after India defeated Pakistan in the T-20 World Cup cricket match.

questions.meaning: galaxy visible as band of stars
questions.sample_sentence: On our family vacation to a hill station, we could see the milky way clearly in the dark night sky.
My grandmother oft makes lentils with rice for dinner at home.
I sat in a pensive mood after my Dhrupad music class, thinking about the raga I had just learnt.
I enjoy watching music videos on YouTube on my laptop when I am in solitude.
Nandi the dog is so sprightly that he runs around the entire terrace without stopping even for a moment.
When my mind becomes vacant, I start thinking about rhythm patterns which keeps me engaged.
The vales in Munnar were lush green and full of trees.
My cousin Vishwak and I wandered through the stalls at the Marina Beach fair, trying every snack we could find.
A massive crowd gathered at the Music Academy for T.M. Krishna's music concert.
We found a very interesting music shop on our way to the Hanuman Temple in Mylapore.
My heart was filled with joy when I received the green card from Omana ma'am.
I saw my cousin sister attaching a daffodil flower to her hair clip.
I always draw a neat margin on the left side of my notebook before starting to write my class notes.
The golden dosa served by Sastha Catering Services at our family function looked absolutely delicious.
The sparkling waves at Marina Beach looked magical under the bright afternoon sun during our weekend visit.
The continuous rain in Chennai during December flooded many roads near Greams Road and made travel difficult.
The never-ending queue at the biryani stall during the school food festival tested everyone's patience that day.
My Dhrupad teacher says that music is an inward journey that helps us connect with our deeper self.
I felt lonely when my cousin Prahlad left Chennai after spending the entire summer vacation with us.
The school flags were fluttering in the wind during the sports day celebration at Sishya.
I could see the lights of the buildings near Tidel Park twinkle from our terrace on clear nights.
I took a quick glance at the scoreboard during the IPL match and saw that CSK needed only ten runs to win.
We were all in a gay mood on the last day of school before the summer holidays began.
After eating a huge plate of idiappam and curry, I lay down on the couch and fell asleep instantly.
Playing the mridangam along with my Dhrupad teacher's singing is a moment of pure bliss for me.
It gives me great pleasure to watch Suvasana and Yohann compete with each other in every board game we play.
My father always says that true wealth is the knowledge and skills we gain, not just money in the bank.
